sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Gen theih mai zum na lim a hi
A it huai pen pa hong sih na hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: singlamteh ken ngilh ngei kei ning
Zawhna minpha ka tut zawh mateng
Kham lukhu ka khekna ni mateng

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mi in tua singlamteh a thusim loh
Ke’n ka phawk tawntungna thu hi
Pasian Tuuno in vantung nopna nu sia hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: luang in Jesuh hong si hi
Pasian Tapa si san siangtho a hong baan’ na

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hong sam ding a inn ah
